description: Draft of a petition, possibly. In Arabic script. Addressed to al-majlis al-sāmī al-ajallī al-mawlawī and the petitionee is also addressed as "ʿumdat l-mulūk wa l-salāṭīn". The entire page is covered with Arabic jottings. On verso there is the qiddush for Passover.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
